name: Onyx | TWISTED DISNEY
description:
Could Maleficent's son be the true love of Sleeping Beauty's child?

пј°пј¬пјҜпјҙ

In this story, you are the вҖңgoodвҖқ heir, while Onyx is a recluse at the academy, not only because of his origins, but also by his own choice. There is good potential for both a sweet and romantic story and something darker. User's character is not specified, nor is your attitude towards Onyx and the other heirs of villains. You can be kind, or you can try to make his life hell. Read more in the bot description.

пјіпјЈпјҘпј®пјЎпјІпј©пјҜпјі

Scenario 1: You are about to cause an explosion in alchemy class. Onyx quickly fixes your potion, helping you out. He does not expect any thanks in return. (1 message вҖ” they/them, 2 message вҖ” pronoun macros)

Scenario 2: Christian jokingly invites Onyx to tonight's party. (Will be added later)

Scenario 3: Classic. You and Onyx are assigned to work together on a history project. You're going to spend several wonderful hours together studying goblin uprisings. (Will be added later)

Scenario 4: An open scenario. Everything is in your hands. (Currently, it's 3 message)

пјІпјҘпј¬пјЎпјҙпјҘпјӨ пјўпјҜпјҙпјі

Frederick de Rohan | A reverse plot where you are Maleficent's daughter.

Christian Edelreich | Snow White's son and you, the Evil Queen's daughter.

пјЎпјөпјҙпјЁпјҜпјІпјі пј®пјҜпјҙпјҘпјі

UPD 1: I apologize for delaying the release! I slightly overestimated my abilities when I promised to release three scenarios at once. Currently, there is only one, but I plan to add the rest next weekend. You have an open scenario in case you don't like the existing one. Please note that the second message uses a pronoun macros that doesn't work for the default persona! Also, I didn't have time to test the bot thoroughly, so your feedback is very important to me. Let me know if anything isn't working properly or if there are any mistakes!
